### Testing

- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] All tests pass: `pytest -v`

### Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (run `ruff check && ruff format`)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] PR linked to an open issue (if applicable)
